info.headline: Minor Flood Warning for Upper Onkaparinga River above Verdun, Onkaparinga River at Woodside and Onkaparinga River at Oakbank
info.description:
Minor flooding is likely at Woodside and minor flooding is occurring along the upper Onkaparinga River at Oakbank
The Onkaparinga River at Woodside is currently at 1.85 m and rising, below the minor flood level. The Onkaparinga River at Woodside is likely to reach around the minor flood level (2.00 m) Thursday afternoon.
The Onkaparinga River at Oakbank is currently at 1.53 m and rising, with minor flooding. The Onkaparinga River at Oakbank is likely to remain above the minor flood level (1.17 m) Thursday into Friday. The river is likely to reach around 1.70 m during Thursday, with minor flooding.
info.instruction:
* Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.
For emergency assistance call SES on telephone number 132 500. In life-threatening emergencies, call 000 (triple zero) immediately.

area.areaDesc: South Australia: Upper Onkaparinga River above Verdun, Onkaparinga River at Woodside and Onkaparinga River at Oakbank

info.headline: Minor Flood Warning for Middle Onkaparinga River between Verdun and Mt Bold Reservoir
info.description: Minor flooding is occurring along the Aldgate Creek at Aldgate.
info.instruction:
* Don't drive, walk, swim or play in floodwater because it is dangerous. * Stay away from flooded drains, rivers, streams and waterways. * Obey road closure signs. Plan ahead so you don't drive on flooded roads. * Check the ABC and local media for updates. The situation can change quickly, so stay informed. * For local emergency management warnings and advice visit www.ses.sa.gov.au/incidents-and-warnings/incidents-and-warnings-map/.
For emergency assistance call SES on telephone number 132 500. In life-threatening emergencies, call 000 (triple zero) immediately.

area.areaDesc: South Australia: Middle Onkaparinga River between Verdun and Mt Bold Reservoir
